name: Santa Cruz Shredder - 2 Part Grinder
summary: Santa Cruz Shredder - 2 Part Grinder — a grinder for any patient preparing dried flower.
description: Expertly designed with the finest materials, such as medical-grade anodized aluminium, the Santa Cruz Shredder delivers unparalleled herb grinding capabilities. Its advanced tooth design and threading pattern, coupled with a strong rare earth magnet for secure lid closure, guarantee superior performance. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
